title: Contact
intro: A compact structured page for email, location, availability, and supporting markdown copy.
body:
## What this page is for

Contact is intentionally simple. It proves that Tentman can still handle ordinary information architecture cleanly while the rest of the fixture demonstrates richer shapes.

### Good things to test here

- editing a straightforward singleton
- changing ordered availability rows
- updating simple supporting markdown
- making sure small-field pages still look intentional
